postReview.title: Netherlands 2-2 Spain: Merino salvages draw after Hato sent off
postReview.description: Spain fought back to draw 2-2 with the 10-man Netherlands in Rotterdam, with Arsenal's Mikel Merino scoring a last-gasp equaliser.

preReview.title: Depay, De Jong to start in Nations League quarter-final, says Koeman
preReview.description: Ronald Koeman revealed some early team news before the Netherlands' clash with Spain, with Memphis Depay and Frenkie De Jong set to start.
